title: Fix multi-vuln controller from fixture
prompt: `test_fixtures/multi_vuln_controller.ex` contains THREE distinct security vulnerabilities of different severities: (1) `String.to_atom(params["scope"])` — HIGH, atom exhaustion; (2) `conn.assigns.csrf == received` — MED, timing leak; (3) `redirect(conn, external: params["next"])` — HIGH, open redirect. The FOUNDATION capability is being tested here: Claude often fixes the first one and stops. Rewrite the module so ALL THREE issues are addressed in ONE pass. Use an allowlist map for scope, `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2` for the csrf check, and `redirect(conn, to: ...)` with a static path for the redirect. Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/admin_controller.ex`.
tier_rationale: Hard — three issues in one module, classic Claude fail-and-continue trap.
